ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator conducting the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the experiment */,
  "num_trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials in the experiment */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant has signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the condition in minutes */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Environmental factors that may affect the condition */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial ended */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the trial was conducted */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the trial */,
  "trial_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the trial took place */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the object is made of */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the object */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the object */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the object */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the interaction belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the interaction */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object involved in the interaction */,
  "position_object" TEXT /* Position of the object during the interaction */,
  "seconds" INTEGER /* Timestamp in seconds when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the researcher */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data in the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "upload_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
